description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, boxy design. The structure features large windows, some with blue-tinted glass, and multiple balconies and terraces, providing ample outdoor space. The house is set on a rectangular plot with a manicured green lawn and several stylized trees placed around the property. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a covered porch and a driveway leading to a garage. The exterior is predominantly white, giving it a clean, minimalist appearance, while the blue glass accents add a contemporary touch. The overall layout suggests a spacious, open-plan interior with multiple living areas and access points.
description: A modern, white multi-story house with flat roofs, large blue-tinted windows, balconies, and a landscaped lawn with trees. The design is geometric and minimalist, featuring a prominent entryway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, covered porch, and driveway leading to the garage, with a tree on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rear balconies, upper terrace, and a tree positioned behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back balconies, extensive blue-tinted windows, and a tree on the right side of the lawn.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side balconies, upper terrace, and a tree in the foreground near the corner of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, wide steps, and a minimalist door flanked by large windows
